The space station known as '''Rebellion Remnants''' in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]] was once a prominent home of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The station was attacked and crushed by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] force, prompting artisan [[Sonal Serore]] to give it it's poetic name.

{{Station-stub}}
